articles.title: SPECIALIZED RAG AGENTS
articles.summary: RAG isn't a solved problem. Building agents that can accurately retrieve information from enterprise data stores still requires AI teams to awkwardly cobble together different components, with accuracy and stability far from guaranteed.

articles.title: Read more and see the benchmarks on the Contextual AI blog →
OPENAI'S STARGATE PROJECT
articles.summary: The Stargate Project is a new company that intends to invest $500 billion over the next four years to build new AI infrastructure for OpenAI in the United States.

articles.title: MICROSOFT ENDS EXCLUSIVE CLOUD PARTNERSHIP WITH OPENAI
articles.summary: Microsoft is no longer OpenAI's exclusive cloud provider, signaling broader opportunities for OpenAI to expand its partnerships with other providers.

articles.title: MORE TEENS SAY THEY'RE USING CHATGPT FOR SCHOOLWORK
articles.summary: A Pew Research Center poll revealed that 26% of teens now use ChatGPT for homework assistance, doubling last year's figure. Comfort with AI use varies, with 54% accepting it for research but only 18% for essay writing. While initial bans were imposed, many school districts have eased restrictions on classroom AI use.

articles.title: EFFICIENT BYTE LEVEL MODELS AT SCALE
articles.summary: EvaByte is a model from SambaNova trained on byte level language modeling. It performs on par with models two generations old (e.g., Llama 2). While this may seem slightly disappointing, it is a big win for byte level models, which have been stuck at sub 1B parameter scale for some time.

articles.title: TREAD: TOKEN ROUTING FOR EFFICIENT ARCHITECTURE-AGNOSTIC DIFFUSION TRAINING
articles.summary: A novel approach to improved sample efficiency for Diffusion models that doesn't involve modifications to the underlying architecture.

articles.title: ML APPLICATIONS IN ARCHAEOLOGICAL PRACTICES
articles.summary: A comprehensive review of machine learning applications in archaeological practices.

articles.title: MEDICAL REASONING
articles.summary: MedSSS is a slow-thinking small medical language model built with a self-evolution pipeline.

articles.title: TOOL-USE BENCHMARK FOR LLMS
articles.summary: MTU-Bench is a new benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' tool-use capabilities across various scenarios.

articles.title: MMAUDIO
articles.summary: MMAudio is a video-to-audio system that takes videos as input and creates paired audio based on the video's content. It works well with both synthetic and real videos.

articles.title: GOOGLE IS BUILDING ITS OWN ‘WORLD MODELING' AI TEAM FOR GAMES AND ROBOT TRAINING
articles.summary: Google DeepMind is forming a team led by Tim Brooks to develop AI "world models" for simulating physical environments. These models aim to enhance real-time interactive media and training scenarios, contributing to Google's pursuit of AGI. The initiative will collaborate with existing Google AI projects like Gemini and Veo.

articles.title: HARNESSING AI TO RESPOND TO THE GLOBAL THREAT OF ANTIMICROBIAL RESISTANCE
articles.summary: AMR-Policy GPT is an AI tool that uses LLMs to aid in antimicrobial resistance policy development across 146 countries. The tool provides policymakers with contextually relevant information, fostering better-informed National Action Plans, especially in regions lacking local data or infrastructure. The project is co-led by academics from the Chinese Academy of Sciences and Durham University.

articles.title: WHAT'S NEXT FOR AI, AND STEM-CELL THERAPIES
articles.summary: AI predictions for 2025 include advancements in customized agents, generative video, and versatile robots. Meta is dropping professional fact-checkers, shifting responsibility to users, causing concern among its former partners. MIT Technology Review has highlighted emerging stem-cell therapies as one of ten breakthrough technologies for 2025.

articles.title: WRITER RAG TOOL: BUILD PRODUCTION-READY RAG APPS IN MINUTES
articles.summary: RAG in a few lines of code? Writer's predefined RAG tool integrates your data into a Knowledge Graph, enabling AI interactions with a single API call. No complex setups, just scalable, accurate AI

articles.title: workflows. Learn more about Writer's RAG tooling here.
HEYBOSS (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Heyboss is an AI engineer for non-coders that can build websites, apps, and games.

articles.title: NVIDIA'S HUANG SEES AI ROBOTS BOOSTING MANUFACTURING
articles.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang predicts that AI robots will first impact manufacturing, boosting productivity and offsetting lost revenues, thus reducing inflation.

articles.title: DDN NABS $300M FROM BLACKSTONE AS AI KEEPS DATA STORAGE HOT
articles.summary: Blackstone is investing $300 million in data storage firm DDN, valuing it at $5 billion.
